title: Luffy Rejects the Trap
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on luffy rejects the trap, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Luffy Rejects the Trap. Crocodile toys with Vivi and the Straw Hats while his agents move the plan toward full civil war. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Clutch!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Fufu...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: It seems that the "Strongest Warrior of Alabasta" isn't worth much.

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: Pell!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This can't be!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Now then, let's get going...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It can't...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The boss and your companions are all waiting for you,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Inside a cage,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: At Rain Dimmers...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Look at me, I'm Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: "Was it you who ate the meat?"

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Would it kill you to be a little more serious!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: We're trapped in a freakin' cage right now for God's sake!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Yeah, we know! But we've got nothing else to do BECAUSE we're trapped!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: you should be serious BECAUSE we're trapped!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: We could die like this, you know!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: And why the hell are you sleeping?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: What, is it morning already?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It's always been morning!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Quite a spirited girl, aren't you...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Oh, sure! Enjoy your little peace while it lasts!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Because once this guy here busts out of this cage,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: He'll kick your ass all the way above the clouds!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Right, Luffy!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: You bet your ass!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: It appears you've got your crew's unwavering trust, Straw-Eat Luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Trust...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Kuhaha!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Is there anything more useless in this world?

summary: This part develops luffy rejects the trap and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
